content: No direct SAM-vs-ImageJ fiber-diameter comparison found. Adjacent work: NP-SAM (SAM for nanoparticle segmentation in electron microscopy) and a U-Net-based distance-map method for automatic fiber diameter computation from micrographs (PMC11398094) which generates a distance transform to compute width along the fiber, conceptually similar to a skeletonize+width approach this project should use post-SAM2-mask.
